title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz General in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz General:
Bajaj Allianz General is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
